name: Beef and Macaroni Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook macaroni for about 7 minutes.
2. Brown the meat in a large saucepan and drain off all fat.
3. Add garlic, chili powder, salt, and pepper to the meat mixture.
4. Mix well and cook on low heat until thoroughly heated, about 5 minutes.
5. Stir in the cooked macaroni and tomato soup.
6. Heat the mixture until it is thoroughly warm throughout.
7. Just before serving, add grated cheese and cover. Continue heating until the cheese melts.
